questions.q: How can I be sure a candidate who interviews well will actually perform?
questions.a: Traditional interviews are flawed. Our Axiom Cortex™ AI provides auditable, scientific proof of a candidate's problem-solving ability, not just their credentials. We provide an Evidence Locker, not just a gut feeling, to de-risk your hiring decision. This reduces mis-hire risk by over 90%.

questions.q: Are we losing good candidates because our hiring process is too slow and biased?
questions.a: Yes. A slow process costs you top talent. Our platform-driven process reduces Time-to-Offer to a median of 9 days. The Cortex Calibration Layer in our AI ensures we evaluate pure technical skill, not just linguistic fluency, mitigating bias against non-native English speakers.

questions.q: Why do we keep hiring 'senior' developers who can't architect a scalable system?
questions.a: Because resumes don't measure cognitive traits. Our evaluation specifically scores for 'Architectural Instinct,' ensuring you hire engineers who can think in systems, not just write code.

questions.q: How do I avoid the security nightmare of unmanaged remote devices?
questions.a: You don't. We provide every engineer with a corporate-owned, MDM-enrolled laptop, enforcing security policies, encryption, and auto-patching from day one. This provides an audit-ready security posture and eliminates a massive compliance risk.

questions.q: Is my engineering manager spending more time managing vendors than managing engineers?
questions.a: This is a common 'hidden tax.' Our integrated platform eliminates vendor chaos by bundling EOR, payroll, devices, and compliance into a single accountable SLA. We give your managers their time back to focus on building product.

questions.q: How do we handle the legal and compliance complexities of hiring in multiple LATAM countries?
questions.a: You don't have to. As the Employer of Record (EOR), we handle all country-specific contracts, payroll, taxes, and statutory benefits. We absorb the legal complexity so you can scale without building a global HR department.

questions.q: My CFO sees a lower hourly rate from another vendor. How do I prove the real cost is higher?
questions.a: Use our TCO Model. We help you quantify the massive hidden costs traditional vendors don't mention: management overhead, productivity loss from time-zone lag, and the financial impact of mis-hires. Our all-inclusive rate provides a predictable, CFO-ready TCO that is often 40-60% lower.

questions.q: How do I quantify the cost of a role sitting empty for 60 days?
questions.a: This is the 'Vacancy Tax.' A delayed feature worth $1M in ARR costs you over $160,000 in lost opportunity for a 60-day delay. Our 9-day Time-to-Offer pulls that future revenue forward, providing a clear ROI on hiring velocity.

questions.q: Is the 12-hour time difference with my offshore team really hurting us?
questions.a: Yes. It's the 'human latency tax.' Every simple question requires a 24-hour round trip, killing agile workflows. Our nearshore model provides 4-8 hours of daily overlap, enabling the real-time collaboration needed to ship fast.
